resources:
en Language JugglucoNG
OK Cancel
"Init Garmin connect SDK failed: "
Scanning impossible, no NFC on this device NFC is disabled, you can enable it in device settings.
Kerfstok is not installed on watch Kerfstok is not installed on watch. In Garmin Connect IQ store you can get it
Too low or too high glucose Juggluco has lost contact with sensor Reminder to dose, eat or exercise Notifies current glucose value Ongoing program Permission Scan Scans History Stream Reset Help Search to past No bluetooth Bluetooth Enabled Bluetooth Disabled Amounts @string/amountsname Meals Close Saves up to the last value displayed on the screen. The beginning is the number of specified days back in time. Detect Test IP Test Label Passive only Active only Both Receive from "Data present on receiver until: " Visible Password Delete Specify \'Receive from\' or data to send to other device You should specify an IP Network ports should be between 1024 and 65535 Start Now Mirror sends amounts This host: Doze mode? Sync Alarms Save Add Connection Off Touch Glucose notification Low glucose alarm "Label: " "Round to: " "Weight: " Ringtone High glucose alarm Value available notification Loss of signal alarm after "Can't set minutes to " minutes is too long "Target range: " "Graph range: " "Units" Glucose-axis LEFT Scanning starts app xDrip compatible Disable camera key Invert screen NFC sound Manually scale Time Glucose Sensor via bluetooth For Alarms in non-Mirror devices \'Sensor via bluetooth\' should be turned on Set unit first Number Labels Colors Reminders Display Shortcuts Advanced New Delete last Meal: Ring Days \' invalid. Days should be a natural number. Summary graph Forget Reenable Info Last failure Last success Stage Use Bluetooth Connection Handshake Glucose value Info Set device specific setting Update in doze mode Refresh Send queue Reinit Watch app installed on watch Error Add Item "Round " Repeat Ingredient: Select Carbohydrate: Carbohydrate Total: Meal total: Quantity " per " You need to specify ingredient You need to specify how much Define Edit Name: Carbohydrates/unit: Database Search Trace Unknown Show zero Composition of 100 gram Status Config Init watch app No watches found Get watch app Kerfstok Meal Delete? Sound Play Default Flash Permission Shortcut Value Next page IPs: Port "saved" Save failed Not saved Failed by exception No data Add sensor end date to calendar app "End date sensor " Open Without sensor Library not functioning properly, try a different one Installed library Can\'t extract %s, try a different apk Connecting Runs to exchange data "No new value since " " Low Glucose!" " High Glucose!" @string/lowglucose @string/highglucose Send to Resend data Minimum Minutes deactivated: Duration (sec): Duration: sec " not entered" " and " Disturb Send to Libreview Libreview Send now "Sensor via Bluetooth" should be turned on or this should be configured as a mirror Vibrate Turbo Dark mode Multiply with: Rapid acting insulin Long acting insulin Comments Don\'t send Send amounts Resend data? Be careful not to send overlapping data to Libreview. Get Account ID from Libreview? The Account ID is needed to use Libre3 sensors that are activated with Abbotts Libre3 app with this Libreview account. Delete connection? Wakelock Wifi Heart rate Libre (patched App) Glucodata GlucoDataHandler (GDH) xDrip broadcast AAPS compatible Sensors permission needed to display heart rate. Set it in Device Settings, Apps, Permissions, Juggluco Floating glucose @string/floatglucose
Font size @string/fontsize Font size too large: max= Foreground Background Back-
Transparent Touchable
Needs permission adb shell pm grant tk.glucodata android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW https://www.juggluco.nl/Jugglucohelp/floatingconfig.html Delete reminder? Delete label?
Disconnect Stop using this sensor for streaming?
E-Mail: Get Account ID
E-Mail address too short E-Mail address too long Password should be at least 8 characters long Maximal password length is 36 characters From Libreview Manually "No account id specified " "Wrong format " "No app listening to " api_secret Leave without saving? Active Use SSL Full Chain
Private Key Local only : api_secret too long. max= " invalid port number" "new api_secret: " "new port =" Web server Give Amounts Android Something went wrong " dose " " doses " Reading insulin pen failed. Try again. "Change insulin type to " "Type: " Only add doses from after: Modify Not synced Setting to defaults can result in loss of data. Defaults Notify Separate Immediate Alarm is alarm Speed Pitch Voice Seconds between Test Bluetooth History Spy views No value Talk Watch Menus System UI Sensors Settings About Export Mirror New Amount List Statistics Float Last Scan Date Day back Day later Week back Week later Talk touch Speak messages Speak alarms Speak glucose Not found No Ringtone Picker found "Can't play " " seconds" "Duration can't be negative: " " too large, maximum=65535, " " too large" Can\'t use specification Turn on NEARBY DEVICES permission Enable Bluetooth Turn on Location permission Bluetooth is turned off When everything is sent to a host, \"Receive from\" should be turned off. The port number should be different from the mirror port The port number should be different from the http port " ready in " Sensor ready for use " ends at this time" Tried nothing Success All data will be sent again which takes time and can have consequences for Libreview and Kerfstok Error parsing IP Maximal number of hosts exceeded Juggluco sends to maximal 6 hosts hostname Now clamp "Send from: " Change start Above Uploader Upload Sibionics mmol/L mg/dL Interval Off Off " Streaming enabled" " Streaming not enabled" EverSense Broadcast Threshold Make floating glucose untouchable?
12h Complications Watchface color
Glucose value Glucose arrow Value + arrow Glucose Value small Glucose Arrow small Value + arrow small
Text Arrow WARNING: “Receive from” not set, but some data types are not sent. First specify for each label what should be done with it. Photo Scan the data matrix of a Dexcom G7/ONE+ or Sibionics GS1 sensor or the mirror QR code. Predict (Dexcom) Initializing Juggluco running on phone?\n\nWIFI and Bluetooth enabled? Connected! Close button \u23F0 File size Logging Insulin Aspart/NovoRapid/NovoLog Fiasp Insulin Lispro/Humalog URLi/Lyumjev/insulin lispro-aabc Insulin Glulisine/Apidra Human Insulin/Humulin R/Novolin R Afrezza Not Sibionics EU Sibionics Chinese Hematonix Sibionics 2 Split "Data present: " Overwrite? Auto QR
Send data from this phone to another phone on your home network. Pressing OK will generate a connection on this phone and display a QR code that can be scanned by another Android device. Scanning the QR code with left menu→Photo on the other phone will generate a connection, by which it will receive all data from this phone.
Google scan WARNING: weight (%.1f) not 0
" Very LOW glucose!" " Very HIGH glucose!"
" Very LOW!" " Very HIGH!"
" Soon LOW glucose!" " Soon HIGH glucose!"
Very low glucose alarm Very high glucose alarm
Alarm when soon below Alarm when soon above Schedules "Profile " Loss of signal Value notification
Scan TRANSMITTER data matrix Sibionics 2 sensor data matrix succesfully scanned. \nScan now the transmitter data matrix." Successfully added connection to left middle menu→Mirror. Reset Clears transmitter memory. Should be pressed before using a new sensor in an already used transmitter. Use the EverSense Broadcast instead. See help. Calibration Exclude Apply to past Blood glucose: Visual mode Calibrated Delete calibration? Hide
Nothing yet Calibrations All values Write down! Switch "Last: " "Only add glucose readings from after: " "First select the label for blood glucose" "Glucose Meters" "Find devices" "No new data" "New data" Connected Disconnected phone watch Direct sensor- Enter amounts on connection Bug Internet Home net ICE Username
ICE Label 0 1
Mirror via QR Turn Servers Turn Server
Notification Chart Display glucose graph in notification bar Use Google Play Services for QR scanning Share/Receive data via Internet/Home Net Upload to Nightscout Glucose Alerts and Alarms Target Glucose Range Select Unit Select Theme Select Language System Default Scanner
Debug Logs Clear Trace.log Logcat Log enabled. Waiting for entries... Log unchecked. Enable to start. "Error reading file: " "Error saving file: "
Mirror Settings Auto QR Home Network Home Net Sender Internet Sender Home Net Receiver Internet Receiver Close Connection Label Deactivated Enable Disable ICE ICE Label Hostname / IP Test IP Test Label Master Passive Only Active Only Data present until: Show password Hide password
Turn Server Add Connection Help Send to Receive from QR Amounts Scans Stream Exchange data
Dashboard Stats
No data available days Status No sensors found Add Sensor Sensors Add Sensor
Calibration Algorithm Restart auto-calibration? Clear all in-app auto-calibration data, restart algorithm and reconnect? Restart Auto Raw Auto+Raw Raw+Auto Broadcast Restart auto-calibration
The trend is rising by %1$s percent. The trend is falling by %1$s percent. The trend remains unchanged.
%1$s in use %1$s remaining Expired %1$dd %1$dh
Theme System Default Light Dark
Advanced Debug Logs Nightscout Config
LibreView Sync with Abbott LibreView LibreView Settings Email Password Send to LibreView Enable LibreView upload Show Current Glucose Mark as Viewed Send Insulin/Carbs Send Now Resend Data Account ID Get Account ID Status Russia region
Low High
Disconnect Sensor? This will permanently stop the sensor session. This will disconnect the sensor. Pairing keys and history are preserved — you can reconnect later. Remove Sensor? This will permanently remove the sensor, wipe pairing keys, and stop the session. The sensor must be re-paired to use again. Remove Wipe sensor data Disconnect Keep sensor info
Reconnect Sensor? This will reset the connection and attempt to reconnect. Reconnect
Forget Sensor? This will remove the sensor from the list. It may reappear if scanned again.
Reset sensor? This will reset the Sibionics 2 sensor. Continue? Reset sensor
Reset all? Clear all old data, calibrations, and reset the sensor? Reset all
This will restart the sensor and reset the auto-calibration algorithm. Keep auto-calibration data
Enabled Disabled Last BLE status Address Started Ends Officially Expected End Battery Auto reset %1$d days Never
No Sensor Connected Connect a continuous glucose monitor to start tracking your glucose levels.
Sibionics Setup Scan Sensor QR Code Scan the data matrix on the sensor packaging Select Sensor Type Scan Transmitter
Connecting... Setup Complete
Libre Setup Hold your phone near the sensor to scan Scan Libre Sensor LibreView Account Libre 3 sensors require a LibreView account for activation. Enter your credentials to sync data and activate new sensors. Scan Sensor Skip Next Done
Dexcom Setup Scan the data matrix on your Dexcom sensor Scan Dexcom
Accu-Chek Setup Scan the data matrix on your Accu-Chek SmartGuide sensor Scan Accu-Chek
CareSens Air Setup Scan the sensor code on your CareSens Air package Scan CareSens Air
Delete Sensor This will remove the sensor and all its data. This cannot be undone. Delete
General Settings Alerts and notifications
Data Management Export Data Save history to CSV/TSV Import Data Load backup or Libreview file Days to export Quick range Add patient information Hide patient information Optional details included in exported reports. Patient name Patient ID Date of birth Care team
Danger Zone Clear History Remove all glucose readings. Cannot be undone. Remove all glucose readings from database Clear App Data Remove history and cache, keep settings Factory Reset Remove everything, return to first-run state Remove EVERYTHING. Cannot be undone! Factory Reset? Clear History? Clear App Data?
Turbo (high priority) Requests high connection priority AutoConnect Uses passive background connection View trace.log and logcat
mg/dL mmol/L Alert Mode Sound & Vibrate Vibrate
Low High Very Low Very High Forecast Low Forecast High Signal Loss Missed Reading Persistent High Sensor Expiry Value Available Amount Alert
Import History Import glucose data from a CSV file Get started by adding your sensor Select Sensor Type " or " No sensors connected
Enter Sensor Codes Enter the codes printed on the sensor label Batch Code (10) First code on label (8-16 chars), e.g. %1$s Serial Number Second code (10-20 chars), e.g. %1$s Confirm
Enter Transmitter Code Enter the transmitter ID from the label Transmitter ID 8-12 characters from transmitter label
Scan QR Code Scan the QR code on your generic Sibionics sensor box. Scan QR Code Select from Gallery Skip (Use Fake Sensor) Enter Code Manually
Choose your Sibionics sensor variant Continue
Sensor initialization failed Error: Sensor lost. Please restart setup. "Invalid device name: " "Failed to connect to " Sensor not initialized. Use \'Scan Sensor\' first. Invalid code format. Please try again. No QR code found in image
Go Filter by date Select Export Format CSV File (.csv) Best for Excel/Analysis Readable Text (.txt) Best for sharing/printing Export Export History Save glucose readings to CSV or text file Import History Restore glucose readings from CSV file
Clear History? This will remove all glucose readings from the database. This action cannot be undone. Clear
Clear App Data? This will remove: • All glucose readings • Cache files • Sensor data • All settings Settings will be preserved. This action cannot be undone. Clear Data
⚠️ Factory Reset? This will REMOVE EVERYTHING: The app will return to first-run state. THIS CANNOT BE UNDONE! RESET EVERYTHING
Alert Sound GPL-3.0 • Fork of Juggluco Refreshing...
Auto-calibration mode Juggluco native window Auto restart algorithm
Bluetooth off Connection failed Connected Disconnected Connected, waiting for data... Connected, raw values received
Select sensor type Choose theme Sibionics Scan QR code Libre 2/3 Via NFC Dexcom G6/G7/One Accu-Chek SmartGuide Scan Data Matrix + Bluetooth CareSens Air Scan code + Bluetooth AiDex / LinX Configure AiDex or LinX CGM via Bluetooth
Scan Transmitter Select a nearby device or scan the QR code. Clear previous state Scanning for devices... Search Bluetooth Found Devices: Looking for nearby transmitters... Or scan QR code Scan Transmitter Connecting to sensor... Please wait while we establish a connection.
AiDex / LinX Setup Searching for sensors... AiDex: couldn\'t parse sensor serial from "%1$s" Connecting to %1$s... Connected! Finish Show sensors only See all devices %1$s • not recognized as AiDex %1$s • selectable AiDex-family device %1$s • selectable via FF30 detection
Statistics Your glucose analytics Time in Range Average A1C (GMI) In Range Low High Very Low Very High Variability Score CV: %1$d%% Standard Deviation: %1$s %2$s Glucose Management Indicator Estimated A1C based on your glucose data Coefficient of variation: standard deviation divided by average glucose. Lower values indicate steadier glucose. Std dev Standard deviation: typical distance of readings from your average glucose. Target <7.0% Hourly Patterns Daily Trends Insights Detailed Statistics Readings Median Min Max Range Start tracking your glucose to see statistics Loading...
Excellent Very Good Good Moderate High
Excellent Control! You\'re spending %1$d%% in range - above the 70%% target! Good Progress %1$d%% time in range. Aim for 70%%+ for optimal control. Room for Improvement Currently at %1$d%% TIR. Consider discussing with your healthcare team. Stable Glucose Your variability (CV: %1$d%%) is within target range (<36%%). Great job! High Variability CV of %1$d%% suggests significant glucose swings. Great A1C Estimate Estimated A1C (GMI): %1$.1f%% - within target range! A1C Estimate GMI: %1$.1f%%. Slightly above the 7%% target.
Glucose Variability Index Measures glucose stability and variability patterns Personal Glycemic State Your personal glucose baseline and trends Excellent Stability Good Stability Moderate Variability High Variability Stable Baseline Elevated Baseline Low Baseline Unstable Pattern
1D 3D 7D 14D 30D 90D
ALL
12 AM 6 AM 12 PM 6 PM
View Details %1$d%% %1$s %2$s
Low High Min Max GVI PSG Stability Confidence Variability GMI Hourly Pattern Avg TIR Total Readings CV
Lowest Highest Typical Daily Pattern Detailed Statistics
Active Time Range Add High Alert Add Low Alert Alerts active from %1$s to %2$s Alerts active from %1$s to %2$s (next day) Alert after Alert name Alert Style App Default Sound Custom High Custom Low Custom Sound Selected Default snooze Delete custom alert Duration End High Alert High Alerts High Alerts Look ahead Low Alert Low Alerts Low Alerts Max retries %1$d min Only alert during selected hours Other Alerts Predictive Alerts Preemptive Snooze Snooze alerts before they trigger Re-alert if not dismissed Constantly Retry every Retry forever Retry if no reaction Every %1$d min • %2$d retries Constantly • %1$d retries Constantly • forever Every %1$d min • forever Select time for %1$s Snooze System Default Sound Tap to change Threshold %1$s - %2$s Volume/Vibration Profile
Font source App (IBM Plex) System Sans System Size: %1$d sp Font weight Regular Medium Device List Glucose Meter Glucose Meter List IOB IOB Help Night Post Nightscout Help About Active positions (randomized) Active time range Add custom sound Addconnection Adjust sensor readings Advanced Alarms Help Scanning for AiDex devices... Alarm Help e.g. Dawn Phenomenon All calibrations cleared Anchor API secret Appearance Apply to all alerts Background opacity: %1$d%% Battery Bias correction Compensates for low readings during the first 48h after reset No pairing or GATT connection required Broadcast-only mode Calibrate Connect sensor first to calibrate. Enter a blood glucose value in %1$s to calibrate the sensor Calibrate Sensor Calibration deleted Calibration profile exported Calibration (%1$s) Calibration Help Calibrations: %1$d Deleted %1$d calibrations %1$d calibrations will be removed Calibrationslist Camera Permission Changestart Choose what to clear Clear calibrations Clear disabled only Color Help Conditions optimal Connection %1$d Connectionoverview Corner radius: %1$d dp Correcting Custom sound: %1$s - Data mode %1$d days %2$d hours Delete %1$d calibrations Deselect all Cleared %1$d disabled calibrations Disabled calibrations: %1$d Disabled: %1$d Display secondary values Show secondary values alongside main reading Display Help Disturb Help %1$d dp Dock to camera cutout Dynamic Island mode Edit alert Edit Calibration Edit connection Enable Bluetooth first Enable calibration Enable overlay Show floating glucose overlay on top of other apps End: %1$s Exchange Help Experimental Export Complete CSV Export failed Export failed: %1$s Export profile Export Readable Report Report visual style Current Minimal Swiss Medical Journal Premium Dark Ink Elegant Typography Export successful Filled Firmware Flash Permission Floating window permission required Floating Config Gap width: %1$s Garmin Config Getaccountid Help Getlib Active All alerts disabled Glucose (%1$s) Hardware reset Clears internal storage, restarts session counter, and enables bias correction Health Permission Helpexport %1$d hours remaining Import failed: %1$s Import profile (merge) Import profile (replace) Imported: %1$d, skipped: %2$d, replaced: %3$d Imported %1$d readings Intensity Intercept Intro Help Invalid profile Kerfstok Label Help Librenum Help LibreView Location Permission Log Help Master alert control Navigate back Meal Help Metrics Connection settings for this mirror endpoint. Mirror error (%1$d) Configure send/receive and mirror server settings. Model Modes Nearby Permission New calibration (%1$s) New custom alert Newamount Newlabel Help Nightnum Help Enable Nightscout upload Nightscout upload Uploading in background Uploads paused Upload options Upload Insulin/Carbs (Treatments) Nightscout Settings Sync actions Nightscout URL https://my-nightscout.herokuapp.com Use Nightscout v3 API No active sensor selected No calibrations to export Not implemented natively Notification Permission Nutrients Offset Override silent mode Play alerts when phone is in silent mode. Pair Points Position and layout Preview Previous calibrations Re-initializing... Reminders Requesting account ID... Resend Data (Reset) Resend triggered Manage initialization bias correction and hardware reset Reset and correction Restart algorithm Restart algorithm to apply changes Restart with current window Restart with standard algorithm Ringtone Schedule Help Search Help Expand Collapse Select alert sound Select all Selected (%1$d) Send / receive Send to: Sending... Sensor age Sensor expired Sensor life Sensor Help Sensormirror Setlibrenumtype Setting Help Settings changed — press to apply Shortcut Help Show trend arrow Slope Start: %1$s Stat Help Staticnum Stop Syncing... Talk Help Test alert Text alignment This action can be undone. Threshold (mg/dL) Typography Unable to open destination file Unable to open source file Undo Unknown error Unpair Delete the pairing bond on the sensor and clear saved keys. The sensor will be free to pair with another device. The sensor entry will remain in the app but will no longer connect. Unpair sensor Update URLs Vertical offset: %1$d dp Visuals Wait ~15 min (unstable) Watchinfo Wearosinfo Delete sensor data from this device. Wipe sensor data Manual calibarion
Generated %1$s · Page %2$d Patient information Not enough readings to render AGP profile. P10-P90 IQR Not enough daily data to render trend. No readings for this day. JugglucoNG CGM Clinical Report Range %1$s · Readings %2$d · Window %3$s to %4$s Estimated A1C Below target Above target Data density %1$s of 5-min cadence Time in range distribution Goal met Below goal TIR target (70%%): Below: %1$s Above: %1$s Ambulatory glucose profile (24h percentile bands) Reference targets: GMI < 7.0%%, CV <= 36%%, Time in range >= 70%%. JugglucoNG CGM Daily Trends and Interpretation Daily variability, metric breakdown, and interpretation notes Daily average trend Detailed metrics Std deviation PSG baseline Confidence %1$s Min / Max glucose Target low / high Very low / very high Clinical insights No generated insights No additional pattern warnings were generated for this time range. AGP consensus reference Targets referenced in this report follow AGP international consensus style: TIR 70-180 mg/dL (3.9-10.0 mmol/L), TBR <70 and <54 mg/dL, TAR >180 and >250 mg/dL, with CV goal <=36%%. JugglucoNG Appendix I - AGP and Daily Tables Hourly percentiles and day-level outcomes Hourly AGP profile table Hour Samples IQR (P25-P75) No hourly AGP bins available in this range. Daily outcomes table Showing latest %1$d of %2$d days. JugglucoNG Appendix II - Events and Daily Profiles Hypo/hyper exposure metrics and day-level profile charts Hypo / hyper exposure events Hours/day Events/day Avg duration (h) Daily glucose profiles Hide source values Show only calibrated values when calibration is enabled. Calibrated only Source + calibrated Lock past history Use only calibration points at or before each reading time. When off, calibration starts near the first calibration point and extends forward. Write calibrated values Write in DB for statistics, reports, and export. Visual mode: continue calibrating from the value you currently see. Scan this QR Code on the Follower device Nearby Sibionics BLE (FF30) If your sensor appears here, Bluetooth is alive. QR scan is still preferred for full setup. No FF30 Sibionics devices found yet. Selected: %1$s Use fake QR info from this BLE name Wear transport Configure Wear OS data transport and sync state. Wear transport runtime is available. Wear transport runtime is unavailable for this app session. Google Play Services unavailable; Wear transport is disabled. Force a fresh watch discovery and network sync cycle. Nightscout-compatible web server Invalid interval value Waiting for connection Sensor ready in %1$d minutes.
